serverInfo.name: milkyway-center-v131
serverInfo.title: Milkyway Center — V131 Topological Photonic Cipher
serverInfo.description: Hardware-validated dual-layer photonic cipher: 1.4ns deterministic encryption, 99.75% perfect frame rate, 0/40 anti-spoofing rejection on real 30m fiber. FPGA-native physical-layer security for HFT and critical infrastructure.

resources.name: V131 Hardware Validation Report
resources.description: Full hardware validation report: 9/9 tests passed, dual-layer cipher architecture, anti-spoofing results, HFT infrastructure relevance.

resources.name: V131 Hardware Validation Report (Markdown)
resources.description: Machine-readable markdown version of the V131 hardware validation report.
